summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Divine Iris Healing website clone completed. Backend (16/16 tests passed) and Frontend (all critical flows working). All major features verified: homepage sections, golden menu overlay, programs/sessions/transformations pages, admin panel with login persistence, image upload/serving.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Image URL resolution utility (resolveImageUrl) working correctly for both relative /api/image/ paths and external URLs
Admin login persistence via localStorage working correctly
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - database already has 6 programs, 6 sessions, 6 testimonials, 4 stats
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Homepage (hero, programs, sessions, testimonials, newsletter, footer), Golden menu overlay navigation, Programs page with image cards, Services page with sidebar layout, Transformations page with testimonial grid, Admin panel (login with admin/divineadmin2024, persistence via localStorage, CRUD operations), Contact page form, Image upload via /api/upload/image returning /api/image/{filename} format, Image serving via /api/image/{filename} with correct content types.

homepage.hero_section: PASS - Logo, title 'Divine Iris Healing', tagline visible
homepage.sessions_section: PASS - 6 session tabs with detail view
homepage.testimonials_section: PASS - 6 YouTube video thumbnails in carousel
homepage.footer: PASS - Contains MENU, PROGRAMS, CONTACT sections

navigation.golden_menu_overlay: PASS - Opens on MENU click, golden gradient background, all nav links visible
navigation.menu_items: PASS - HOME, ABOUT, SERVICES, UPCOMING SESSIONS, MEDIA, PROGRAMS, CONTACT

pages.programs_page: PASS - 6 programs with images and 'Learn More' buttons
pages.services_page: PASS - Sidebar layout with 6 session tabs and detail view
pages.transformations_page: PASS - 24 testimonial image cards in grid
pages.contact_page: PASS - Form with name, email, phone, message fields
pages.program_detail: PASS - Loads program info with uploaded images

admin.persistence: PASS - Stays logged in after page refresh (localStorage)
admin.tabs: PASS - Transactions, Programs(6), Sessions(6), Testimonials(6), Stats, Subscribers

api.image_serving: PASS - GET /api/image/{filename} returns image with correct Content-Type
